speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon.
text: Bimar mummy ki caregiving mein itni thak gayi thi ki apni partner ki shaadi tak attend nahi kar paayi, par ghar walon ke samne bas 'thakan' ka bahana banaya. Divorcee hone ke naate pehle hi 'log kya kahenge' wala darr hai, ab LGBTQ identity bata kar main parivaar ki bachi-kuchi izzat mitti mein nahi mila sakti. Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational conflict of preserving family honor by sacrificing her own truth.
text: Ghar walo ki bachi-kuchi izzat aur unke darr ki wajah se, aap apne sabse gehre sach ko chupa kar sab kuch akele seh rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyonki divorce ke baad mummy waise hi samaj ke tano se andar se toot chuki thi. Agar ab mera LGBTQ wala sach sunengi toh unka kya haal hoga? Main unhe aur pain nahi de sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the implied fear of shattering her mother completely if the truth comes out.
text: Ye darr lagatar bana rehta hai ki aapki asli identity bahar aane se, aapki mummy aur parivaar poori tarah se bikhar jayenge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Pehle hi divorce ki wajah se relatives piche baten banate hain. 'Log kya kahenge' soch soch kar saans rukti hai meri. Is stigma ke chakkar mein main kabhi khud ko accept hi nahi kar paungi khul ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Responding to stigma cue with a soft, short restatement using Lens B to gently hold the heavy burden of duty and societal judgment.
text: Samaj ke in tano aur apni sachai chupane ke is lagatar bojh ko uthana bohot thaka dene wala lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon.
text: Bhot bhari pad raha hai. Ek taraf bimar mummy ki caregiving karke physical exhaustion hota hai, aur dusri taraf andar ki suffocation mujhe maar rahi hai. Apni partner ko shaadi karte hue dekhna pada mujhe. Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the breaking point reached over time by balancing this double life.
text: Itne lambe samay se ek acchi beti ka natak karte karte, aur uske upar se apne pyaar ko hamesha ke liye door jate dekh kar, aap bilkul thak chuki hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: It literally feels like I have no life left. Meri khud ki koi jagah nahi bachi, bas main ek caretaker hoon jisne divorce deke pehle hi naam kharab kar diya hai family ka.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a question based on her words to explore how she manages to keep functioning despite feeling worthless.
text: Jab aapko apne hi ghar mein sirf ek caretaker aur guilty person ki tarah mehsoos hota hai, toh is ghutan ke beech aap agle din uthkar saare kaam kaise kar paati hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas apne saare emotions ko switch off kar deti hoon. Ek machine ki tarah ban jati hoon. Kyonki agar maine ek pal ke liye bhi sach mein mehsus kiya, toh main uth nahi paungi bistar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror the extreme duty frame of turning off her humanity just to function.
text: Ghar ke farz nibhane aur mummy ko sambhalne ke liye aapne khud ke jazbaaton ko poori tarah daba diya hai, taaki aap apna din guzar sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, but is wajah se ab lagta hai jaise main akele kisi door jagah par hoon. Main parivaar ko bachane ke liye sab kar rahi hoon, lekin no one actually knows me. Main unke aas-paas reh kar bhi unse kitni door hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the deep unexpressed isolation that comes from preserving relational peace at the cost of identity.
text: Lagta hai is sab ke beech, ghar walo ko dard se bachane aur shanti banaye rakhne ki koshish mein aap ek gehre ISOLATION mein chali gayi hain, jahan aapka asli roop dekhne wala koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly isolation hi hai. Divorce ke baad relatives toh waise hi door ho gaye the judging me. Ab is natak ki wajah se main apne aap se bhi door ho gayi hoon. Bahut akelapan hai is natak ke andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her isolation as a direct result of immense cultural pressure and stigma, separating her worth from it.
text: Apne aap ko is tarah akela mehsoos karna aur lagatar darr mein jeena poori tarah swabhavik hai. Hamare samaj mein divorce stigma aur parivaar ki 'izzat' ka itna bhari bojh dal diya jata hai ki kisi ko bhi apni asli identity mitani pad sakti hai, is sab mein aapki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon.
text: Kami chahe meri na ho, par saza toh mujhe lagatar mil rahi hai. Partner kisi aur ki ho gayi, mummy ki health kharab hai, aur main bas chup hoon. Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize suppressing one's life to uphold family duty post-divorce.
text: Akele parivaar ki dekhbhal karne wali divorced women mein apne wajood ko bhula kar 'achi beti' bane rehna bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka struggle nahi hai, lekin koi iske baare mein bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein auraton ke farz ko hamesha unki khushi se bada mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sab silently bas yehi expect karte hain ki meri life toh weise bhi barbaad hai, toh main saari umar yahi sewa karti rahun bina complain kiye. Mera apna future mujhe ekdam dark aur empty lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the fear of a completely empty future if she continues this way.
text: Aapko yeh darr satata hai ki agar sirf samaj aur parivaar ke farz ko dhote rahe, toh aapka apna aane wala waqt poori tarah se andhere mein kho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main is tarah se completely gayab nahi hona chahti life se. Main sach mein thoda sa theek hona chahti hoon. Thoda sa apne liye saans lene ki jagah chahiye, batao ab main kya karoon jab poora waqt duty mein nikal jata hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, accessible suggestions that fit into her busy caregiving schedule without adding new obligations.
text: Aapki mummy ki caregiving ke is packed schedule mein, thodi saans lene ke liye do chote kadam try kar sakte hain: Ya toh raat ko 5 minute kisi digital locked journal app mein apni real feelings likhein, ya phir kisi anonymous online LGBTQ support group ko read karein taaki akelapan kam ho. Inme se kuch aasaan aur doable lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Online support group wali baat theek lag rahi hai. Raat ko jab mummy dawai kha kar so jati hain toh mujhe thoda akela time milta hai bistar pe phone ke sath. Wahan at least I don't have to pretend.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the setup of the online space step by step for immediate ease.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aaj raat mummy ke so jane ke baad, phone par ek safe anonymous forum search karo... phir ek anjaan naam se wahan free account bana lo... bas itna hi karna hai aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haa, bas account set up karungi. Main chat ya baat nahi karungi abhi, bas dekhungi. Mujhe lagta hai ye itna chota step hai ki mujhe anxiety feel nahi hogi isko try karne mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing creating a hidden private space as a necessary survival tool within strict societal confines.
text: Bilkul, aur aise sakht samajik daayre jahan divorce aur 'log kya kahenge' ka itna dar ho, wahan apne khud ke liye aisi private aur safe jagah banana ek behad zaroori survival tool hota hai, koi galat natak nahi.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon.
text: Thank god aapne aise bola. Main khud ko guilt de rahi thi ki ek aur chupa hua kaam karne ja rahi hoon. Unka sar samaj mein uncha rahe, isliye main apni sacchai hamesha daba kar rakhti hoon, par at least online main apni sachai dekh sakungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the balance she's struck between keeping peace outside and finding freedom inside.
text: Online ki azaadi aur real life ki in bandishon ke beech aap aisi jagah dhoond rahi hain jahan aapko bhi saans mile, aur mummy ki shanti bhi bani rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly this. Ab tak main sochti thi aisi koi situation exist hi nahi kar sakti jisme dono survive karein. Par it is starting to feel possible ki main khud ko preserve kar sakti hoon without breaking my family.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to highlight her duty shift from just others to including herself.
text: Parivaar ke haq mein apni poori zindagi rok dene ke baad, aakhirkaar aaj aapne apne khud ke zinda rehne ke haq mein pehla kadam uthaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. I really needed this validation. Aaj raat time aate hi main account bana lungi pakka. Just admitting all of this to someone made me feel so light.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the relief felt after such a long period of keeping secrets.
text: Itne salon ke lamba struggle akele aur chup chap jhelne ke baad, aaj yeh saara bhaar nikal kar aapko waqai kaafi sukoon mil raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot sukoon mila. Abhi mummy ko khana dene jaana hai mujhe, unka checkup ka time ho gaya hai. Par honestly ab mujhe itni ghutan feel nahi ho rahi unke paas jane mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the reduction of the fear/suffocation now that she has an outlet.
text: Agay badhne ka yeh darr aur bojh thoda kam hua hai aur ab shayad mummy ke samne caregiving karte hue utni suffocating takleef nahi hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Ek sawal tha, agar mujhe wapis panic ya bahut akelapan laga kal parso, toh kya main aapse phir aise connect kar sakti hoon online?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the newfound relational connection here in the support setting.
text: Aap is safar mein akele bilkul nahi hain aur aap jab chahein is safe jagah par wapas mujhse baat karne aa sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks a lot for this. Pata nahi divorce stigma and samaj ki expectation wali feeling poori tarah jayegi ya nahi, par at least I feel accepted today. I have some place to breathe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirming her resilience in making space for herself against the heavy societal expectations.
text: Is samaj ke 'log kya kahenge' ke lagatar tano ke beech apni ummeed juta kar apne liye breathing space banana sach mein kabile tareef hai, aur yeh akele mein ek bahut badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapka bohot shukriya. Main ab mummy ke room ki taraf jati hoon. Unka khayal rakhna ab shayad utna bojh nahi lag raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to warmingly close by affirming her return to her duties with a lighter heart.
text: Apni zimmedariyon ko poora karte hue, aaj apne apna khayal rakhne ki jo nayi raah chuni hai, uske liye aapko aage ke safar ki bohot saari shubhkamnayein.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho.
text: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho. Caregiving ki exhaustion ki wajah se main us wedding mein bhi nahi ja saki jahan thoda sukoon milta. Ab samaj mujh par dusri shaadi ka pressure daal raha hai. Main ek 'achi beti' banne ke bojh tale dab gayi hoon, maryada bachani hai. Apni LGBTQ identity kisi ko batane ka soch kar hi mujhe bahut darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational sacrifice Seeker makes to protect family honor and peace (Lens C).
text: Apne bacchon aur ghar ki shanti banaye rakhne ke liye, aap khud ko poori tarah bhula kar bas sabki baaton ko maan lene par majboor mehsoos kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, thak chuki hoon akele sab sambhal kar. Par biradari ka pressure itna zyada hai ki mana karna namumkin hai. Bacchon ka future kharab ho jayega agar meri LGBTQ reality unhe pata chali. Bahut darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the feared consequence regarding the children's future without pressing on the stigma (Lens E).
text: Kahin sach bahar aane se bacchon ke future par aanch na aaye, yeh darr itna bhaari hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho.
text: Bahut zyada bhaari hai. Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho. Par sach yeh hai ki main andar se ghut rahi hoon. Caregiving duties ne waise hi drain kar diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the prolonged duration of this exhaustion and suffocation (Lens D).
text: Itne lambe samay se apne sach ko chhupate hue, roz is ghutan aur thakan ke saath jeena aapko andar hi andar poori tarah nichod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak toh aisi gayi hoon ki rone ki himmat bhi nahi bachi. Ek taraf se bacchon ki dekhbhal, doosri taraf dusri shaadi ka naya bojh. Community exclusion ka darr mujhe har pal khata rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirror the feared consequence of being excluded from the community (Lens E).
text: Samaj se bahar nikal diye jaane ka yeh khatra aapko aur bhi akelepan mein daal raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho.
text: Akeli toh main hoon hi. Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho. Bas yahi ek single mother ki reality ban gayi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the underlying isolation stemming from the conflict between identity and relational preservation.
text: Lagta hai ki maryada aur bacchon ki zimmedari nibhate-nibhate, aap ek aise gehre isolation mein chali gayi hain jahan aapki asliyat ko samajhne wala koi hai hi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul waisa hi hai. Meri LGBTQ identity ke bare mein soch kar hi rooh kaanp jaati hai ki log kya kahenge. I feel so cut off aur hamesha ek darr rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Respond to stigma cue with a shorter restatement focusing on the emotional toll (Lens D).
text: Khud ke andar chal rahi is sachhai ko hamesha chupane ka bojh waqt ke saath aur badhta ja raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Kabhi kabhi mujhe apne relatives par gussa aata hai ki woh mujh par dusri shaadi ka pressure kyun daal rahe hain. Par phir lagta hai ki kalesh karke main sirf apne bacchon ka nuksaan karungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframe the near-anger moment into the duty and impossibility of expressing it (Lens C).
text: Apne parivaar aur samaj se itni narazgi hone ke bawajood, bacchon ke future ko surakshit rakhne ke farz ke aage aap us gusse ko dabane par majboor ho jati hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kyunki main apne bacchon ke liye buri maa nahi banna chahti. The constant hiding is just completely exhausting. Mujhe sach mein nahi pata main aur kitne din yeh jhel sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the exhaustion as a culturally expected outcome of carrying heavy family expectations.
text: Ek 'achi beti' aur maa ka farz nibhate hue aise thak jana bilkul natural hai, khaas kar hamare samaj mein jahan 'maryada' ka bojh itna zyada hai, aur is ghutan ke aage aapki khud ki kimat bilkul kam nahi hoti.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne theek kaha, par mujhe aage ka rasta nahi dikh raha. Meri identity ek taraf hai, aur ghar walo ki expectations doosri taraf. Main phans gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote highlighting that this pattern is structurally common for single mothers.
text: Single mothers mein apne bacchon aur parivaar ki izzat ke liye apni identity daba dene ka yeh pattern bahut common hai—sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj aur biradari ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi bolta nahi hai yahi dikkat hai. Ab is marriage pressure ka main kya karoon? Mujhe kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... batao main kya karoon taaki yeh baat tal jaye bina kisi tamashe ke?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer low-effort suggestions that buy time without creating conflict.
text: Kya hum in do choti cheezon mein se koi ek try kar sakte hain: Pehla, jab bhi rishte ki baat aaye, toh seedha 'abhi bacchon ke exams aur padhai ka critical time hai' bol kar baat ko 6 mahine aage badha dena? Ya doosra, jab pressure zyada ho, toh bas 2 minute ke liye kisi aur kamre mein ja kar thanda pani peena?

speaker: Seeker
text: Pehla wala excuse theek lag raha hai. Bacchon ki padhai ka reason samaj mein relatives jaldi maan lete hain aur mujhe openly mana bhi nahi karna padega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step for immediate clarity.
text: Pehle jab agli baar koi rishte ki baat chhede, toh aap unse shanti se kehna, 'Abhi bacchon ki padhai sabse zaroori hai, is saal shaadi ka koi time nahi'… phir turant topic change karke kisi doosri aam baat ko shuru kar dena… bas itna hi koshish karna agli baar.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho.
text: Haan, main yeh step le sakti hoon. Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho, lekin ab seedhe haan bolne ki jagah main thoda time le lungi is excuse se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she is fulfilling her duty while finding a safe way out (Lens B).
text: Ek maa ke is duty wale role ka sahara lekar, aapne seedhe mana karne wale kalesh se bachne ka ek chota sa tareeka nikal liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi karna padta hai yahan. Agar ek aurat seedhe mana kar de, toh usko character certificate thama dete hain. Meri baaki reality toh kisi ke khawab mein bhi nahi aa sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe normalizing the pressure to be 'good' and hide identity.
text: Yeh jo 'acha' banne aur khud ko chupane ka dabaav hai, yeh asal mein society ka ek banaya hua dhancha hai jahan auraton ki khud ki pehchaan ko hamesha unki family roles ke peeche hi rakha jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap theek keh rahe hain. Maine zindagi bas 'achi beti' ya single mother banne mein nikal di. Meri khud ki identity toh jaise ab gaayab hi ho gayi hai in farzon ke beech.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of her true identity completely disappearing (Lens E).
text: Is samajik dhaanche ke beech, kahin aapka apna asli wajood hamesha ke liye inhi expectations ke tale na mit jaye, yeh soch aapko bechain karti hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut bechain karti hai. Par ab main akele is society se nahi lad sakti. Bas raat ko jab bache so jate hain, main akele baith kar internet par apne jaise logon ke bare mein padhti hoon. Wahi meri safe space hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask about how she maintains this space amidst the survival struggle.
text: Is surviving ke dauran, kya yeh raat ka shant waqt hi woh akeli jagah hai jahan aap apne asli sach ko thodi der ke liye khul kar mehsoos kar paati hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, un kuch palon mein koi mujh par shaadi ka ya bacchon ka pressure nahi daalta. Main wahan sirf main hoti hoon, kisi farz se bandhi hui nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the temporal aspect of her finding peace at night (Lens D).
text: Din bhar responsibilities nibhaane ke baad, raat ke unhi chand akele lamhon mein aap azaad hokar sirf apni pehchaan ke saath waqt beeta paati hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Thoda himmat aati hai wahan se. Kam se kam is shaadi ke topic se deal karne ke liye main kal woh bacchon ki padhai wala excuse use karke apne aap ko thoda aur waqt de sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her resilience in creating small moments of peace and successfully finding a protective strategy.
text: Raat ke un kuch palon mein apne liye yeh chota sa aashiyana banana aur kal ke liye ek excuse tayyar rakhna, aapki bohot badi resilience dikhata hai, khaas kar us mahaul mein jahan rozana expectations aapko thaka deti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho.
text: Exactly. Bacchon ke future aur ghar ki shanti ke liye main har rishte ko haan bol deti hoon taaki koi kalesh na ho, par is baar main thodi acting karungi 'haan' bolne ki bajaye delay karne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she is preserving the relationship by shielding herself behind her children's future (Lens C).
text: Apne bacchon ke future ko dhal bana kar, aapne doosron ke rishton ki demands aur apni shanti ke beech ek safe boundary tayyar kar li hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Seedhe na bolne ka risk toh main kisi halat mein nahi le sakti warna bahut kalesh hoga. Thank you ki aapne meri is uljhan ko itne bina kisi judgement ke samjha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a second systemic reframe validating her approach of delaying without arguing.
text: Bina bahas kiye sirf delay karna ek bohot practical aur samajhdari bhari strategy hoti hai aise restrictive mahol mein, jahan seedhe inkaar karne par community exclusion ka khatra ho sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aaj itne dino baad aapse yeh sab baant kar dimaag se ek bojh utar gaya hai. Kal ke liye ek plan hai, toh thodi shanti lag rahi hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the shift from fear of the consequence to relief and confidence (Lens E).
text: Bahar walon ke samne kal ki baaton ka jo ek bada darr tha, ab uski jagah ek thehrao aur hal nikal aane ki rahat ne le li hai...

coping_shade_signal: dukh chhupakar bas Mummy ke samne muskurati rehti hoon
text: Haan, aur bacchon ka future bhi toh dekhna hai. Agar samaj ko ya biradari ko mere partner ke baare mein pata chala, toh bacchon par kya asar padega? Ye soch kar hi main sharm se mar jaati hoon. Unhe ek acchi life dene ke liye aur family ko bachaane ke liye, main dukh chhupakar bas Mummy ke samne muskurati rehti hoon, par andar se puri tarah tut chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational burden of protecting her children and family from society's harsh gaze.
text: Bacchon ke future aur samaj ke taanon se unhe bachane ke liye, aap apne partner aur apni khushi dono se doori bana kar chal rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot doori ban gayi hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai mera wajood sirf dusron ke liye hai. Single mother hona apne aap mein ek saza jaisa lagta hai kabhi kabhi, saari zimmedariyan akele uthani padti hain. Aur fir ek aurat ho kar kisi se pyaar karne ka toh jaise mujhe haq hi nahi hai. Ye sab soch kar lagta hai ki kya main koi galat kaam kar rahi hoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Explore the internal doubt caused by sacrificing her desires to fulfill her demanding roles.
text: Akele itni saari zimmedariyan uthate hue, jab aapko apni khushiyon ko galat manna padta hai, toh yeh aapke andar kaisa ehsaas jagata hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dukh chhupakar bas Mummy ke samne muskurati rehti hoon
text: Ek ajeeb si thakan aur guilt feel hota hai. Main dukh chhupakar bas Mummy ke samne muskurati rehti hoon kyunki unka heart weak hai. Agar main unhe apni identity bataungi, toh wo sehan nahi kar payengi. Unhone mujhe itni mehnat se bada kiya, aur ab main unhe dhokha de rahi hoon ek aisi life chah kar jo biradari kabhi accept nahi karegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how fulfilling her duty to her sick mother makes her feel like she is betraying her.
text: Mummy ki tabiyat ka khayal rakhne aur ek achhi beti aur maa ka farz nibhane ke bojh tale, aap khud ko hi dhokhebaaz samajhne lagi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Har roz subah uth kar bacchon ka tiffin banao, Mummy ki dawai do, kaam par jao... aur in sab mein 'main' kahan hoon, pata nahi. Mera partner wait karta rehta hai, aur main time nahi nikal paati. Mujhe sharam aati hai apni majboori par. Izzat aur samaj ne mujhe jhakad liya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the prolonged exhaustion of ignoring herself in this rigid routine.
text: Har roz is thaka dene wale routine mein apni zaruraton ko piche chhodte-chhodte, ek lamba waqt guzar gaya hai jahan aapne khud ko completely bhula diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kaafi waqt nikal gaya. Aur is process mein main sach mein bohot akeli ho gayi hoon. Bahar se sabko lagta hai main ek strong single mother hoon jo sab akele sambhal leti hai, par andar se koi mujhe nahi samajhta. Na main Mummy ko sach bol sakti hoon, na apne partner ko pura waqt de sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the isolation coming from balancing family preservation and a hidden identity.
text: Lagta hai ek taraf family ki expectations aur dusri taraf apni identity ko bachane ki koshish mein, aap ek bohot gehra ISOLATION aur akelapan mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, isolation hi hai ye. Ghar bhara hua hai logo se, bacchon ka shor hota hai din bhar, par main andar se ek sannaate mein jee rahi hoon. Ye do zindagi jeena bohot bhari pad raha hai. Ek aisi aurat jise samaj izzat deta hai, aur dusri jo bas thoda sa pyaar chahti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the isolation and shame as a cultural reaction to the pressure put on single mothers.
text: Humare samaj mein ek single mother par izzat aur parvarish ka itna dabaav hota hai, ki uske aage apni pehchaan chhupane se jo akelapan aur sharam aap feel kar rahi hain wo ek normal reaction hai, isme aapki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dukh chhupakar bas Mummy ke samne muskurati rehti hoon
text: Aap sahi keh rahe hain, society ka structure hi aisa hai. Par is pressure mein main apne aap ko kho rahi hoon. Main bas chahti hoon ki kisi din ye mask na pehanna pade. Abhi toh halat ye hai ki main dukh chhupakar bas Mummy ke samne muskurati rehti hoon, aur raat ko chup chap rone ke alawa koi chara nahi bachta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share a brief systemic anecdote about women in traditional families hiding their identity.
text: Aise traditional pariwaron mein ghar ki auraton mein sabko sambhalne ke chakkar mein apni identity dabana bahut common hai — sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr sabko chup kara deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye jante hue bhi ki main akeli nahi hoon, sach mein thodi rahat milti hai. Par ab is ghutan ka kya karoon? Bacchon ko aur Mummy ko chhod kar toh kahin ja nahi sakti. Please mujhe batao kya karoon jisse kam se kam main roz thoda theek mehsoos kar saku?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer 2 safe, short options to express her hidden identity without disrupting her roles.
text: Kuch chote kadam utha sakte hain jo safe hon. Jaise din mein 5 minute jab bacche school gaye hon, tab ek diary mein apne partner ko bina bheje ek letter likh kar dil halka karna, ya raat ko sote waqt sirf apne liye ek chota sa voice note record karke delete kar dena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Voice note wala idea safe lag raha hai. Diary toh bacche ya Mummy galti se padh sakte hain, wo risk main nahi le sakti. Voice note main earphone laga ke ahista bol sakti hoon, usse shayad mere partner wali feeling thodi validate hogi. Par ye karu kaise bina guilt ke?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the voice note idea step by step.
text: Pehle phone mein voice recorder open karo... phir apne aaj ke us waqt ke baare mein sirf ek line bolo jo aapne apne liye miss kiya... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sirf ek line bolna zyada overwhelming nahi lagega. Ye main zarur try karungi aaj raat jab sab so jayenge. Itna toh main apne wajood ke liye kar hi sakti hoon, at least apne asli emotions to process honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe on how rigid structures cause her guilt.
text: Yeh jo andar ki kashmakash aap jhel rahi hain, wo darasal ek aisi biradari ki banawat ka hissa hai jo auraton ko sirf maa ya beti ke roop mein hi dekhti hai; yeh conflict aapki galati nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye baat bilkul sach hai. Unhe lagta hai aurat ka apna koi dil ya identity nahi hoti. Is society ke structure ne hi mujhe aur meri jaisi kitni single mothers ko bandh rakha hai. Thoda bojh halka lag raha hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how letting go of the feared societal blame has reduced her guilt.
text: Samaj ki un expectations ke darr se bahar nikal kar, ab aap samajh rahi hain ki is saari ghutan mein aapki koi khud ki galti nahi thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab guilt utna heavy nahi lag raha. Main samajh gayi hoon ki mujhe unko protect karne ke liye apna mask pehanna padta hai, wo majboori hai. Lekin apne akele waqt mein mujhe wo mask utaarne ka hak hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational boundary she is creating to protect her family while saving space for herself.
text: Family ke bachaav ke liye jo duty aap din mein nibhati hain, uske bawajood raat ke akelepan mein aapne khud ke sachi pehchan se judne ka faisla kiya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Raat ka wo waqt sirf mera hoga. Mere partner ne hamesha mujhe samajhne ki koshish ki hai, aur jab main thoda theek feel karungi, toh usko bataungi ki main ye choti koshish kar rahi hoon apni identity ko zinda rakhne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her duty towards her partner and identity amidst the chaos.
text: Apne partner ke support ko pehchante hue, aapne apne rishte aur apni sachi pehchaan ko is farz ki bhagdaud ke beech zinda rakhne ka rasta nikal liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rasta mushkil hai par thoda possible lag raha hai ab. Aapse baat karke mujhe wo isolation feel nahi ho rahi jo subah se khaa rahi thi mujhe. Thank you itni aasaani se meri baat samajhne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of relief after a prolonged duration of loneliness.
text: Itne dino se is isolation mein akele ladne ke baad, aaj thoda sa sahara milne par wo purani thakan ab kuch kam mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Waise ab bacchon ke aane ka waqt hone wala hai school se. Mujhe unke khane ki taiyari karni hai. Wapas se us 'ideal mother' wale role mein jana hai, par aaj utni thakan nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her strength in returning to her motherly role while holding space for herself.
text: Us ideal maa ke role mein wapas jana jisme aapne itne saal bacchon ko safe rakha hai, aapki bohot badi taqat hai, aur apne liye akele thoda sukoon chun-na aapki is taqat ko aur badhayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baaton ne ek alag hi disha dikhayi hai. Main koshish karungi ki apni thakan ko aur guilt ko waise na dekhu jaise ab tak dekhti aayi thi. Voice note wali baat mujhe constantly ek safe space degi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how hiding her feelings in a safe space gives her hope without disrupting her family.
text: Bina kisi ke jaane apni feelings ko apne tak aur apne partner ki yaadon tak mehdood rakhne ka yeh tarika, aapke liye ek nayi umeed ban raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Waise ek baat puchni thi, kabhi kabhi jab ghutan dobara badh jaye, toh kya yahan waapas aa sakti hoon? Mummy ki tabiyat jab kharab hoti hai toh pressure phir se peak par chala jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her fear of future pressure and desire for a secure sanctuary.
text: Dobara se us bhari pressure aur aane wale kisi bhi darr ke samay, aapko lag raha hai ki aisi koi surakshit jagah ho jahan aap bina mask pehne khul ke bol sakein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Wo safe space bas yehi mili mujhe. Bahar toh sab mujhe judge karne ke liye taiyar baithe hain. Yahan mujhe validation mili ki mera pyaar ya mera wajood galat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the judgement as a flaw of the structure, not her.
text: Judgement ki ye aadat toh us biradari ka hissa hai jahan sabko ek chaanche mein dhaala jata hai; aapne is chaanche ke bahar apni sachi saans lene ka rasta dhundh liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Chalye, ab main phone rakhti hoon. Bacho ki aawaz aa rahi hai gate par. Aaj main bina bojh ke unke saath smile kar paungi. Thank you again.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close with warm support, affirming her readiness to face her role.
text: Bacchon ke paas is nayi energy ke saath lautne ke liye aap puri tarah taiyar hain; main hamesha yahan rahunga jab bhi aapko thodi der bina kisi darr ke baat karni ho, apna dhyan rakhiyega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai
text: Main kya hi bolun ab. Ek ajeeb si helplessness lagti hai har waqt. Divorce ka darr aur uske sath juda stigma society mein itna bada bojh hai mere liye. Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai. Roz ek ghutan hoti hai ki main kabhi apne asli roop mein samaj ke samne nahi aa sakti, bas kalesh ko avoid karne ke liye din raat ye natak kar rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror the relational pressure to maintain peace at the cost of her own self.
text: Apno ke beech ki shanti banaye rakhne aur kalesh se bachne ke khatir, aap apne poore wajood ko kisi aur ke hisaab se jeene par majboor mehsoos kar rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai
text: Majboori hi hai ye. Pehle hi ek toote hue rishte ka thappa laga hai mujh par, ab log aur baatein banayenge. Ghar walon ki toh izzat mitti mein mil jayegi na. Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai kyunki unka samman zyada zaroori hai mere akele ki khushi se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to softly mirror the feared consequence of ruining family honor, responding to the stigma cue.
text: Parivaar ke samman par log sawaal uthayenge, us badnaami ka darr aapko apne andar ke sach ko aur bhi gehrai mein chhupane ke liye majboor kar deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur us sach ko chhipane mein meri saari energy chali jati hai. Subah office jao wahan perfect employee bano, ghar aakar achi beti ka role nibhao jo bina kisi shikayat ke sabka dhyan rakhti hai. Meri apni identity bas ek acting banke reh gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the daily, relentless duration of maintaining this dual life.
text: Roz subah se raat tak is dohari zindagi ko barkarar rakhna, jahan aapka har ek pal kisi aur ki umeedon ko pura karne mein nikal jata hai, andar se bilkul nichod raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai
text: Sach mein nichod diya hai mujhe is natak ne. Bheed mein sabke sath reh kar bhi main itni akeli hoon kyunki koi mera sach nahi janta. Jise main pyaar karti hoon usko toh public mein mention bhi nahi kar sakti. Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai, bas koi mujhse sawal na kare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gate met (Intensity 3 + conflict named). Naming the underlying ISOLATION created by preserving relationships.
text: Jab aap bata rahi hain ki aapko har pal ek chadar odh kar jeena padta hai, toh lagta hai is lagataar shanti banaye rakhne ki koshish mein aap ek bohot gehri ISOLATION aur akelapan mehsoos kar rahi hain, jahan aapka dard samajhne wala paas mein koi nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul akeli pad gayi hoon. Office mein colleagues apne partners aur family life ke bare mein baat karte hain, aur main bas blank face bana kar unki baat sunti hoon. Mujhe toh permission hi nahi hai normal feel karne ki is samaaj mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her emotional reality by connecting to the cultural burden of hiding one's identity to survive stigma.
text: Humari society mein ek aurat ke liye waisi hi itni pabandiyan hoti hain, us par apne asli roop ko akele apne andar sambhal kar rakhna; aise mahaul mein yeh alag-thalag mehsoos karna bilkul natural hai, isme aapki koi kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kami nahi hai, par mujhe khud par itna gussa aata hai ki main kyu nahi bol paati. Kyu main itni darti hoon. Par phir rishtedaro ki kadwi baatein aur taane yaad aate hain toh lagta hai chup rahna hi theek hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her impossibility of expressing anger due to relational fears, pausing for the stigma cue.
text: Aas-paas ke logon ke taano aur unke dil ko thes lagne ka khayal hi aapke us gusse aur sach ko bahar aane se poori tarah rok deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai
text: Rukna hi padta hai. Mere sach se unki khushiyan chhin jayengi, aur wo main afford nahi kar sakti. Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai, lagta hai meri poori zindagi aise hi farz nibhate nikal jayegi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using systemic anecdote template to normalize erasing one's identity for family honor.
text: Working women aur single daughters mein apne sach aur azaadi ko parivaar ki shanti ke liye daba dena bahut common hai — sirf tumhara akele ka ye haal nahi hai, lekin koi ispe khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr sabko khamosh rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, izzat ka darr bahut bada hai. Par main kab tak aise ghut ghut ke jiungi? Mujhe nahi samajh aa raha aage ka kuch bhi. main poori tarah toot chuki hoon. Kya koi chota sa raasta hai jisse main apni himmat bacha saku bina kisi parivaar wale ko upset kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gate met (Intensity 2 + readiness). Offering 2 small, covert actions within her strict boundaries.
text: Is roz ki ghutan ke beech hum chote se, ekdam niji pal dhoondh sakte hain. Jaise office aate jate waqt 10 minute cab mein apni pasand ka wo gaana sunna jo aapki azaadi ko yaad dilaye, ya raat ko sote waqt phone mein ek hidden note banakar apni asli feelings likh kar lock kar dena. Inme se kya aapke hisaab se thoda aasan lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Notes likhna theek rahega. Cab mein kabhi kabhi colleague hote hain, par raat mein apne room mein main phone mein likh sakti hoon. Ek locked app use kar lungi taaki completely safe rahe aur kalesh ka chance na ho.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step by step.
text: Toh phir is baat ko aaj raat se hi shuru karte hain. Pehle apne phone mein ek aisi secure app lock karna… phir usme sirf apni woh sachi feelings likhna jo saara din chupayi ho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bina dare apni feelings likhna thoda ajeeb toh lagega shuru mein. Pata nahi shabdon mein main express bhi kar paungi ya nahi, itni aadat jo ban chuki hai sab chhipane ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing this hidden journaling space as a vital necessity to resist systemic silencing.
text: Jab samajik umeedain aapko har waqt ek nकाब pehne rakhne ko majboor karti hain, toh wo ek password-protected note aapki asliyat aur azaadi ko zinda rakhne ka ek bohot zaroori zariya ban jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai
text: Azaadi ka zariya... ye baat achi lagi sunne mein. Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai, par us ek app ke andar kam se kam meri feelings freely saans le payengi, bina kisi se dare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to show that within her rigid role, she is carving out a safe space.
text: Ek aadarsh aurat aur beti ka poora farz nibhate nibhate, aapne ab apne wajood ki saanson ko mehfooz rakhne ka ek thikana dhoondh liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Thikana zaruri bhi tha ab. Main real life mein apna truth nahi express kar sakti, ye mere halaat hain, par apne aap se sach bolna toh main afford kar hi sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the relief from her fear of completely losing herself by embracing this private truth.
text: Andar ke sach ke poori tarah se mit jaane ke darr ke khilaaf, khud se woh sachayi jatana aapko ek nai taqat de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Taqat toh de raha hai. Maine pehle sirf negative end socha tha, ki main khatam ho jaungi is fake duniya mein. Par ab lag raha hai ki thodi bahut sanity save ki ja sakti hai is tareeqe se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resilience in finding a way to survive within restrictive conditions.
text: Yeh jaankar sach mein acha lagta hai ki itni bandhishon aur society ke dabaav ke bawajood, aap apni energy aur sachai ko itni samajhdari se bachane ki koshish kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish toh karni padegi, kyunki aur koi raasta nahi hai abhi. Family ko waise bhi mere pichle rishte tootne ka bohot dukh hai, ek aur heartbreak main unhe nahi de sakti abhi. Samay aane par dekhenge aage kya karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her protective choice to spare her family further grief while maintaining her own limits.
text: Apne parivaar ko ek aur gehre dukh se bachane ke irade ne aapko sahi waqt ka intezaar karne ki samajh di hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai
text: Haan, waqt aane par halaat shayad thode behtar honge. Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai, par kam se kam wo kona ab bilkul andhera nahi rahega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the lasting shift from complete darkness to a small beacon of hope in her ongoing journey.
text: Itne lambe arse ke andhere aur khamoshi ke baad, ab apne us chhipe hue kone mein ek choti si roshni jalaye rakhna aapko aage badhne ki himmat de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat mil rahi hai thodi si. Aapse baat karke lag raha hai jaise finally maine apne seene par se koi bada pathar hata diya ho. Koi tha jisne mujhe practically bina taane maare suna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing temporary survival as a valid, intelligent response to unsafe structural conditions.
text: Kathin halaat mein jahan poori tarah azaad hona abhi surakshit na ho, wahan temporary tareeqon se apni sachai aur shanti ko bachana koi kamzori nahi, balki ek bohot samajhdari ka faisla hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajhdari ki hi baat hai. Emotions mein beh kar agar main kuch drastic bol dungi toh meri family toot jayegi. And I care for them too much. Ye double life ek protection mechanism hi hai meri dono duniya ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect her realization that her silence is also a way of protecting those she loves.
text: Apne logon ki parwah aur unki duniya ko bikharne se bachane ke liye hi aapne is muskil raaste ko apna ek dhaal bana liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Dhaal hi hai. Ek aisi dhaal jiske peeche main khud bhi safe rahungi aur meri family ka naam bhi bacha rahega. Aaj ka din mere liye eye-opener jaisa tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to mirror her acceptance of her role as protector while keeping her own spirit safe.
text: Ghar ki shanti aur apna farz nibhate hue apne wajood ki suraksha karne ka yeh naya nazariya aapke liye kaafi madadgaar saabit ho raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai
text: Bilkul madadgar raha. Unki khushi ke liye maine apni feelings ko ek kone mein dafan kar diya hai, par aaj mujhe us kone mein apne aap se dubara milne ki azaadi mil gayi hai. Thank you so much meri baatein sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the relief from her fear of being utterly silenced.
text: Apne andar ki ghutan ko poori tarah nazarandaaz hone se rokne aur us kone mein khud se dosti karne ka ehsaas aapko ek nayi chain de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ab ek chain ki neend ayegi. Jab bhi overwhelming lagega aage, main is phone app mein apna dil halka kar liya karungi. I feel ready to handle my reality now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to validate the continued, future availability of this safe space whenever she needs it.
text: Aage chal kar jab bhi lamba waqt aapke liye thakan bhara ho jaye, apne us surakshit jagah par wapas laut aane ka ek raasta aapke paas hamesha khula rahega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: silent sufferer bani rahungi
text: Main is community exclusion mein isolated hoon par parivaar ke sanskaro ne mujhe bandh rakha hai, isliye wedding miss hone par bhi main chup-chap ghar ki seva mein lagi hoon. Agar maine apni LGBTQ identity batayi toh khandaan ki shaan mitti mein mil jayegi, isliye main ek ideal 'bahu' ki tarah hi ghar sambhalti hoon chahe ab main divorced hoon. Unki khushi ke liye main poori zindagi ek silent sufferer bani rahungi, kyunki rishta bachana hi mera asli 'farz' hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how preserving the family relationships forces her into deep isolation.
text: Apne ghar walo ki izzat aur unse jude rishto ko tootne se bachane ke liye, aapne khud ko puri tarah se akela kar liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul akela. Divorce ke baad waise bhi taane sunne padte hain, upar se meri sacchayi... agar kisi ko pata chala toh biradari mein muh dikhane layaq nahi rahenge. Isliye saans ghutti hai, par main chup rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duty frame clashing with her internal suffocation.
text: Ek aadarsh bahu aur beti ka farz nibhana itna bada bojh ban gaya hai ki aapki apni saans is mahol mein ghutne lagi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh toh hai par koi aur raasta bhi toh nahi hai. Log waise bhi divorced aurat ko galat nazar se dekhte hain, agar meri identity samne aayi toh log jeena haram kar denge. Bahut darr lagta hai in sab baaton se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the long duration of carrying this stigma alone softly.
text: Itne lambe waqt se samaj ke is darr ko akele sehna sach mein bahut bhari lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut bhari lagta hai. Kabhi kabhi chidh hoti hai, gussa aata hai ki meri zindagi meri kyun nahi hai. Par phir dekhti hoon ki parents kitne buzurg ho gaye hain, main unko dukh nahi de sakti. Unki dekhbhal karna hi ab mera farz hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize anger warmly, then ask about the internal emotional toll of this relentless duty.
text: Yeh gussa aana bilkul laazmi hai aisi sthiti mein. Jab aap apna sara waqt aur energy unki khushi aur farz poora karne mein laga deti hain, tab andar se khud ke liye kaisa mehsoos hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se ek ajeeb si khokhlapan aur suffocation hoti hai. Jaise main andar se marr rahi hoon, bas bahar se zinda dikh rahi hoon taaki khandaan ki shaan bachi rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep fear that her authenticity will destroy the family's honor.
text: Kahin na kahin yeh darr har pal rehta hai ki agar aapne apne liye jeena shuru kiya, toh parivaar ka naam aur shaan hamesha ke liye mit jayenge...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur uske baad main khud ko maaf nahi kar paungi. Main unka sara sahara hoon ab. Divorce ke baad unhone mujhe rakha, yahi badi baat hai gaon-dehat ke mahol mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the profound isolation caused by hiding her identity to preserve family ties.
text: Lagta hai ki is ghar aur gaon ke mahol mein sabke beech rehte hue bhi, apne sach ko chupane ki is majboori ne aapko ek bahut gahre akelepan aur isolation mein dhakel diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... yahan koi nahi hai jo mere sach ko samajh sake. Main ek divorced aurat hoon aur upar se queer. Yeh dono baatein biradari ke liye paap hain. I am completely isolated.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate her feelings by connecting them to the structural pressures of the biradari and sanskar, separating her worth from it.
text: Aapka yeh akelapan mehsoos karna puri tarah se normal hai; humare yahan biradari aur sanskaro ka itna pressure hota hai ki queer logon ko apni aawaz dabani hi padti hai, aur is ghutan mein aapki bilkul koi galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: silent sufferer bani rahungi
text: Aapki baatein sunkar thodi himmat milti hai. Warna mujhe hamesha lagta tha ki main selfish hoon. Par itni safayi dene ke baad bhi zindagi toh ek silent sufferer bani rahungi aisi hi lagti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote showing she isn't alone in this exact double-life struggle within traditional families.
text: Aisi traditional families mein jahan izzat sabse upar hoti hai, queer youth ka double life jeena aur akele struggle karna bahut common pattern hai — sirf aap akele nahi hain, lekin koi khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj ka darr sabko khamosh rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Matlab aur bhi log hain meri tarah jo andar hi andar ghut rahe hain? Yeh jaan kar thoda darr kam lag raha hai. Main toh ab tak bas chup-chap ghar ke kamo mein dabi hui thi aur khud ko akela samajhti thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and weight of her continuous self-suppression in daily chores.
text: Din-raat sirf parivaar aur ghar ke kamo mein guzarte hue, itne lambe samay tak apne aap ko is andhere mein daba kar rakhna sach mein bhari safar raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bahut lamba safar. Aur main ab aage aise poori tarah ghut kar nahi jeena chahti. Par main ghar bhi nahi chhod sakti. Koi raasta hai kya jisse thodi saans mil sake?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide two small, completable actions that fit her duties and offer a private outlet.
text: Thodi saans milne ke liye hum do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain jo aapke ghar ke kamo aur farz ko disturb nahi karengi. Pehla, roz raat ko 10 minute apne phone mein ek private secure diary app mein apni feelings likhna, ya dusra, kisi anonymous online LGBTQ+ support group se judna jahan biradari ka darr na ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Diary mein toh darr hai ki koi phone check na kar le, gaon mein privacy toh hoti nahi. Par anonymous online group thoda safe lag raha hai. Wahan main apni sacchayi bol sakti hoon bina dare.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Break down the chosen suggestion into immediate, actionable steps for tonight.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki aaj raat jab sab so jayein, toh akele waqt mein phone par kisi safe queer forum par ek private browser se account bana lo... phir ek aisa username chuno jo aapki pehchaan na bataye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko sab so jane ke baad... haan, yeh main aaram se kar sakti hoon. Us waqt waise bhi neend nahi aati aur sirf overthinking hoti hai. Ek account banana ek aachi shuruaat ho sakti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic reframe that seeking safe space is not betraying the family but a structural necessity.
text: Humesha yaad rakhiye ki apne wajood ko bachaane ke liye aisi choti aur safe jagah dhoondhna dhokha nahi hai, balki un sakht riwazon ke beech zinda rehne ki ek jarurat hai jo sirf family ki izzat ko dekhte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: silent sufferer bani rahungi
text: Dhokha nahi hai... yeh baat apne aap ko baar baar yaad dilani padegi. Main hamesha guilty feel karti thi. Par agar main yahan bhi chup rahi, toh lagta hai aage bhi silent sufferer bani rahungi, aur ab himmat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she is balancing family expectations while finally validating her own existence.
text: Apne is guilt aur parivaar ke rishton ke beech, aapne aaj apne sacche wajood ko thodi hawa dene ka ek bahut bada step liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Step le liya hai. Main online un logon se baat karungi. Mujhe janna hai ki baaki log is double life ko kaise manage karte hain bina pagal hue. Kuch toh seekhne ko milega hi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect how she is maintaining her role while seeking the support she needs.
text: Ghar ki sabse badi zimmedariyan nabhate hue bhi ab aap apne dukh mein shamil logon ko dhoondhne ki disha mein aage badh rahi hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar main poori tarah toot gayi, toh unki seva kon karega. Mujhe theek rehna zaroori hai. Thoda support system hoga toh main ghar ka yeh farz bhi ache se nibha paungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of her resilience and her new shift towards self-preservation.
text: Bahut saalon tak apne astitva ko daba kar sab sambhalne ke baad, ab aakhir kaar aap khud apne andar ki takat ko thoda sukoon dena chahti hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sukoon ki toh bahut zaroorat hai. Aaj aapse baat karke bhi kaafi halka lag raha hai. Pehli baar bina kisi judgement ke apna sach bola hai maine.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Affirm her bravery in speaking her truth today and maintaining her sense of self despite the pressure.
text: Aapne jis tarah se aaj pehli baar apni sacchayi ko bahar nikala hai, woh aapki bohot badi himmat dikhata hai, aur yeh tasalli ki baat hai ki itne strict dehat ke mahol aur pressure mein bhi aapka apna astitva kayam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat ka toh pata nahi, par ab utni ghutan nahi ho rahi. Mujhe bas ek chota sa kona chahiye tha jahan main 'main' reh sakun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how finding this small space eases the fear of being completely erased by societal pressure.
text: Uss ek chhote se kone ki talaash ne shayad us darr ko thoda kam kar diya hai ki society ya biradari aapko puri tarah se mita degi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul! Agar main us online group mein judungi toh mujhe lagega meri ek choti si duniya hai jo sirf meri hai. Wahan koi 'bahu' ya 'divorcee' wale tanz nahi honge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how escaping the traditional demands provides a sense of lightness.
text: Un tanzon aur demands se door, us private space mein aap finally ghar ki jimmedariyon wala bojh apne kandho se utar sakengi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ekdum. Mujhe lagta hai wahan main pehli baar theek se saans le paungi. Ghutan kam hogi. Yeh mere is akelepan ka sabse aasaan aur safe ilaj lag raha hai abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror how she has found a way out of isolation while preserving her family ties.
text: Bahar ke in bandhanon ko bina tode hi, apne akelepan ki deewar mein ek nayi khidki kholne ka rasta aapne dhundh liya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ek nayi khidki. Aaj raat ko hi main woh group dhoondhungi. Thank you mujhe samajhne ke liye, aur bina judge kiye sunne ke liye. Main ab utni lachar nahi feel kar rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a final normalising frame validating her small victory against systemic constraints.
text: Yahi choti choti baatein aur nayi khidkiyan humein aise kathor riwazon ke beech bhi zinda rakhti hain; aisi traditional spaces mein thoda apne liye jeena aur apne sach ko seena khud ek bahut badi jeet hai.
